title: Scheduled refresh + release automation + changelog
context: M4 makes the dataset sustainable: a scheduled refresh runs the freshness job, and release automation cuts versioned, checksummed releases with a changelog and Zenodo DOI. Releases are DCO-signed and never include secrets. This keeps stale 'recruiting' claims from standing and makes corrections traceable.
objective: Automate the scheduled refresh and the versioned release process with a changelog and checksummed, DCO-signed releases.
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduled refresh runs the freshness job and triggers re-verification on a defined cadence.
Release automation produces versioned, checksummed releases with a changelog and Zenodo DOI.
Releases are DCO-signed; no secrets or tokens appear in logs, receipts, or artifacts.
Each release marks 'last verified <date>' so stale data is not mistaken for current.
